dsl_rule.translation_notes: Abandoned Baby Bullish pattern approximated using: (1) price above SMA_50 to confirm bull market context, (2) body size > ATR_14 to identify 'tall candles', (3) volume > vol_ratio_20 to reflect volume performance clues. Exit uses: (1) lower_wick < ATR_7 as inverse of 'tall lower shadows' reversal signal, (2) RSI_14 > 70 as overbought exit. Gap detection not directly available in allowed indicators; pattern formation relies on candle properties and volume confirmation instead.

source_rule_text: Abandoned Baby, Bullish: A rare bullish reversal candlestick pattern that forms when gaps occur, particularly in thinly traded stocks
